text.title: Stakeholder Walkthrough Script Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Stakeholder Walkthrough Script.

example.scenario: 60-min walkthrough on billing-portal payment selector. Decision-ask: pick A (radio list) or B (segmented control) for desktop. 30-min options presentation with trade-offs. Decision: B for desktop, A retained on mobile. 5 off-scope ideas parked. design-decision-log row 084 created.
example.trace: r1-decision-ask-first-5-min → r2-present-options-not-artefacts → r3-signed-decision-line → r5-recap-at-meeting-close → walkthrough stored
